title: Kollea Cool Bag - 30 Litre Cool box -Insulated Cooler Bag Lunch Bag Keep Warm and Cold, Leak-Proof, With Carriying Straps, Multiple Pockets - Ideal for Travel, Camping, Picnics, BBQ
features: 30 L Large Capacity:Kollea cooler bag is large enough to carry important snacks and drinks for a family picnic. The cooler bag holds approx. 20 bottles of beer/30 cans (500 ml) of cola/16 lunch bowls. Get a large cooler bag from Kollea to transport all the food you need for a picnic

Efficiently Keep Cool and Warm: The cool box is made of high-quality aluminium foil, 5 mm EPE cotton and 1680D Oxford fabric from the inside out. There is also a PVC plate at the bottom of the cool box. With multiple protection, food in the picnic bag stays fresh and tasty for a long time

Leakproof & Waterproof: Adopted voltage fusion technology, the inner aluminium foil splicing area is not easy to leak. You can temporarily use the insulated lunch bag as a fish jar or water bucket. The outer Oxford fabric makes the large cool bag durable and waterproof

Portable & Convenient :Kollea outdoor cooler bag is designed with a padded handle and an adjustable shoulder strap. You can carry the insulated food bag in your hands or hang the insulated shopping bag on your shoulder to set your hands free

Multi-scenario Use: The Kollea picnic bag is perfect for many occasions, such as taking cold beer to the beach, carrying delicious food to a picnic, keeping your frozen food or chilled items fresh from the shop and so on. Kollea cooler bag is a good helper in your life
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Detachable Strap Kollea Cooler Bag comes with a detachable strap with a rubber pad that is 39inches/1m long. Dual Zipper It has two zippers that can be opened and closed on both sides smoothly. Durable Handle Made from nylon, the handle can take up to 20kg. Also, have a velcro patch to hold both handles together. Foldable Design You can fold the cooler bag and store it or carry it in your trunk without taking up much space.
